tooltip_install_ffmpeg: Download ffmpeg and save to the add-on folder (Windows only).
ffmpeg_banner: ⚠ ffmpeg not found — cannot cut audio. Click ‘Install ffmpeg’ for auto-install (Windows).
ffmpeg_not_found:
ffmpeg not found.

You can:
  • Click ‘Auto Install’ in Audio Card Cutter (Windows only), OR
  • Install ffmpeg and make sure it is in your PATH, OR
  • Set the absolute path in ffmpeg_path under Tools → Add-ons → Audio Card Cutter → Config.
ffmpeg_install_confirm:
The add-on will download ffmpeg (~80 MB) from gyan.dev and save it to the add-on folder.

Continue?
ffmpeg_install_win_only: Auto-install is only supported on Windows. On macOS/Linux, use your package manager (brew, apt, dnf…).
ffmpeg_extract_not_found: Extraction complete but ffmpeg.exe was not found in the package.
tooltip_set_start: Set start time to current playback position  ([)
tooltip_set_end: Set end time to current playback position  (])
tooltip_add_queue: Add current region + content to the queue (Q)
shortcut_hint: Space play · [ / ] boundaries · P preview · A/D nudge start · J/L nudge end · S/E hear boundary · Q queue · Ctrl+Z undo (use Alt+key while typing)
select_audio_first: Please select an audio file first.
cut_first: Please cut audio first before adding a note.
undo_confirm: Delete the last created note (ID {nid}) and audio file ‘{filename}’?
duplicate_confirm:
Region [{start} – {end}] overlaps ~{pct}% with a previously cut region [{prev_start} – {prev_end}].

Continue anyway?
tooltip_cut_and_add: Cut audio and create note in one step (Ctrl+Enter)
